shutdownPeriods.comments: Commissioning and start up activities were in progress until May 22, 2022 when the facility reached partial commencement of operation of the Polypropylene (PP)  unit. The remaining portion of the facility continued to undergo commissioning and start up activities throughout the calendar year.

The Polypropylene (PP) unit was shut down during this time period. The remainder of the facility was non-operational during the 2022 calendar year and undergoing commissioning and start up activities.
